name: Subsets (Power Set)
description:
Given an integer array nums of unique elements, return all possible subsets (the power set).

The solution set must not contain duplicate subsets. Return the solution in any order.

  • The decision-making process is visualized using a Recursion Tree.
  • At each step, we decide whether to include or exclude the current element.
  • The Call Stack tracks the active recursive depth.
